posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: WWE just launched a YouTube channel for the WCW video library. If any of you are fans of events such as Clash of the Champions 1, Starrcade 1993, and Spring Stampede 1994, check it out.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: There will be a watch party on the WCW YouTube channel at 10:00 AM ET Tuesday April 1. * Edited at 03.31.2025, 8:54 PM ET *

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: The legendary 2 out of 3 falls match between Ric Flair and Ricky Steamboat from Clash of the Champions 6 was uploaded to the WCW YouTube channel today.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: Halloween Havoc pay-per-view events are being released on the WCW YouTube channel this month. Be on the lookout for Halloween Havoc 1991 and 1993.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: The WCW video library will be put on the WCW YouTube channel.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: The main event of Starrcade 1983 is on the WCW YouTube channel.

posts.author: CUZZ
posts.body: I love the wcw cruiser weight division wish I got to see it as a kid but it was a little before my time

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: @CUZZ Check out the match between Rey Mysterio, Jr. and Jushin "Thunder" Liger from Starrcade 1996.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: Be sure to watch Clash of the Champions 17 when it gets uploaded today.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: The main event of Clash of the Champions 26 was uploaded to the channel today.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: Be sure to watch Clash of the Champions 23 today.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: Clash of the Champions 24 was uploaded today.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: The main event of Superbrawl III was uploaded on the WCW YouTube channel today.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: The NWA World Heavyweight Championship match from Superbrawl III between Barry Windham and the Great Muta got uploaded today.

posts.author: CUZZ
posts.body: Great Muta? count me in

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: Clash of the Champions 25 was uploaded today.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: Clash of the Champions 23 was uploaded on the WCW YouTube channel today. This was Michael Buffer's debut as a special ring announcer for main events and title matches on Clash of the Champions and pay-per-view events. * Edited at 03.08.2026, 1:22 PM ET *

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: A compilation of Ric Flair vs Ricky Steamboat matches was uploaded on the WCW YouTube channel today. I think the first 4 matches are the best, especially matches 2 and 3.

posts.author: MMA Anon
posts.body: Solid thread. Currently 3 months into 1998 WWF (Raw and PPVs).

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: Clash of the Champions 26 was published on the WCW YouTube channel today. It is the last great Clash of the Champions.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: Clash of the Champions 27 just got uploaded to the WCW YouTube channel.

posts.author: tepid55
posts.body: Clash of the Champions 28 was published today on the WCW YouTube channel. This event would see Ricky Steamboat's last match.
